title: Contact us for survey help | Stats NZ
content:
## Contact us for survey help
Get in touch if you have questions or complaints about a survey we've asked you to complete.
Contact us about something else

## Get help completing a survey
When you contact us, please quote your reference number so we can quickly identify you.
Your reference number will be printed near the top of letters we send you.
Monday to Thursday 8am to 8:30pm Friday 8am to 5pm Sunday 10am to 6pm
survey@stats.govt.nz
Stats NZ Private Bag 92003 Auckland 1142

## Complaints about surveys
If you have a complaint or concern about your survey experience with us, please contact us so we can resolve it.
complaints@stats.govt.nz
Complaints Stats NZ Private Bag 92003 Auckland 1142
